name: @openvole/paw-calendar
description: Paw for managing Google Calendar events

tools.name: calendar_list_events
tools.description: List upcoming events from Google Calendar

tools.name: calendar_create_event
tools.description: Create a new event on Google Calendar

tools.name: calendar_update_event
tools.description: Update an existing event on Google Calendar

tools.name: calendar_delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event from Google Calendar
